subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! The world is in turmoil, yet none hath discerned the cause thereof. Tribulation and affliction have encompassed the earth, which findeth no peace [3.5s]... ...There is no objection to offering for sale that which is donated in the name of Huquq…. Whoso desireth to offer Ḥuqúqu’lláh with the utmost joy and eagerness
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی عالم منقلب و احدی سبب آنرا ندانسته باسا و ضرا احاطه نموده ارض آرام
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @reward and punishment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
